questions.question:
An upgrade planning brief for the control plane is incomplete and contains unsafe kubeadm lifecycle commands.

A ConfigMap named `upgrade-brief` already exists in namespace `kubeadm-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetVersion` is `v1.31.8`
- `controlPlaneEndpoint` is `k8s-api-server:6443`
- `planCommand` is `kubeadm upgrade plan v1.31.8`
- `applyCommand` is `kubeadm upgrade apply v1.31.8 -y`
- `drainCommand` is `kubectl drain cp-maint-0 --ignore-daemonsets --delete-emptydir-data`
- `uncordonCommand` is `kubectl uncordon cp-maint-0`
- `backupPaths` is `/etc/kubernetes/admin.conf,/etc/kubernetes/pki,/var/lib/etcd`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/upgrade-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text execution checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/upgrade-plan.txt` with the sections `Pre-flight`, `Backups`, `Execution`, and `Post-upgrade`

Do not create a new ConfigMap and do not add live kubeadm upgrade automation beyond the requested plan artifacts.

verification.description: The upgrade brief ConfigMap uses the intended target version, endpoint, backup scope, and safe kubeadm command sequence
The plain-text upgrade checklist is exported with the required sections and commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and no stale unsafe commands remain
